creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: marino
Date: Sun Aug  3 22:52:47 UTC 2014
New revision: 363957
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/363957

Log:
  Add new port: devel/librevisa

  PR:		188811
  Submitted by:	uffe

       ================================================================

  VISA is a multivendor standard for interfacing test and measurement
  equipment.

  LibreVISA aims to be a compliant implementation of the VISA standard in
  a free software library. Currently support for targets connected via USB,
  exposing the USBTMC interface, and VXI-11 devices.

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/librevisa/
  head/devel/librevisa/Makefile
  head/devel/librevisa/distinfo
  head/devel/librevisa/pkg-descr
  head/devel/librevisa/pkg-plist
